name: Richards Luxury Limousines
recent_news: No public news found; no evidence of school district contracts or student transportation activity (2026).
fit_notes: Micro luxury limo operator in Minot, ND. No evidence of school bus/special-needs student transport contracting. Not a fit as a school-bus tuck-in for Summit; tagging as special_needs in source data appears mis-classified.

name: Provide A Ride Transportation
recent_news: No public news; address on W J Hodge St in Louisville suggests micro NEMT/paratransit operator, not a JCPS school-bus contractor (2026).
fit_notes: Very small (~4 employees, ~$283K rev) Louisville operator with no confirmed school-bus contracts. Likely NEMT/paratransit. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: First Class Limosne TRNSP Svc
recent_news: Independent Broken Arrow luxury limo company founded 1994 by Jackie Nuckolls; ~16-car fleet; no school-bus contracts identified (2026).
fit_notes: Luxury/airport limo operator, not a school-bus contractor. Wrong service line for Summit; not a tuck-in target despite long tenure and possible owner succession dynamics.

name: J W Transportation
recent_news: Listed as a Milwaukee County Title 19 transportation provider serving medical and social needs; no MPS school-bus contract evidence (2026).
fit_notes: Micro NEMT/Medicaid transport operator in Milwaukee (a.k.a. Johnny Walker Transportation). Not a school-bus contractor and far below Summit's tuck-in scale; not a target.

name: JRS Limousines
districts_or_customers: Green Bay Packers game charters (per obituary)
recent_news: Founder Edward M. Land died Aug 13, 2025 at age 98; he started JRS Limousines after retiring from U.P. Machine in 1993, primarily driving clients to Packers games and events. Likely dormant or wound down.
fit_notes: Micro limo operator on WI/MI border with founder deceased 2025; effectively a defunct one-man limo business, not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
